description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
Win-CodexBar 0.41.1 fixes localized tray panel and native tray menu text for Japanese, Chinese, Korean, and Spanish, adds missing es-MX UI translations, and keeps provider snapshots independent from UI language changes.
